				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYMay 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 5
					NOT = { month = 6 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYJune 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 6
					NOT = { month = 7 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYJuly 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 7
					NOT = { month = 8 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYAugust 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 8
					NOT = { month = 9 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYSeptember 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 9
					NOT = { month = 10 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYOctober 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 10
					NOT = { month = 11 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYNovember 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 3099
					NOT = { year = 3100 }
					month = 11
					NOT = { month = 12 }
				}
			}
			owner = {
				fourth_age_start_date = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWThe Fourth Age started in ÏYDecember 3099ÏW" } }
			}
		}

		fourth_age_start_date = { secede_province = --- }
	}
}

# How many years has it been since the end of the Third Age?
country_event = {
	id = 99901
	title = "How many years has it been?"
	desc = " "
	picture = administration	
	is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = "This many"
		fourth_age_year = { secede_province = THIS }

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				FOR = {
					check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 144.9 }
					NOT = { check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 145.1 } }
				}
			}
			FOR = {
				set_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 146 }
				fourth_age_year = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWÏY145ÏW Fo.A." } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				FOR = {
					check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 143.9 }
					NOT = { check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 144.1 } }
				}
			}
			FOR = {
				set_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 145 }
				fourth_age_year = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWÏY144ÏW Fo.A." } }
			}
		}

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				FOR = {
					check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 142.9 }

			}

					check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 49.9 }
					NOT = { check_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 50.1 } }
				}
			}
			FOR = {
				set_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 51 }
				fourth_age_year = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWÏY50ÏW Fo.A." } }
			}
		}

				}
			}
			FOR = {
				set_variable = { which = year_of_fourth_age value = 2 }
				fourth_age_year = { state_scope = { change_region_name = "ÏWÏY1ÏW Fo.A." } }
			}
		}

		fourth_age_year = { secede_province = --- }
        country_event = {
            id = 99901
            days = 365
        }
    }
}

# What year is it in Shire Reckoning?
country_event = {
	id = 99903
	title = "What year is it in Shire Reckoning?"
	desc = " "
	picture = administration	
	is_triggered_only = yes

    option = {
        name = "This"
        shire_reckoning = { secede_province = THIS }

		random_owned = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					year = 2954
					NOT = { year = 2955 }
